sitemap.title: Sitemap
sitemap.desc: Overview of all pages in the GAAS R&D Library.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.desc: Overview of the R&D Library designed as an incompressible multidimensional complex system.
dashboard.principle1: Incompressibility Principle — Cannot be compressed into a single hierarchy
dashboard.principle2: Multidimensional structure — Expressed across multiple judgment axes
dashboard.principle3: Bidirectional co-creation — Mutual influence between mathematics ↔ R&D

nobel.title: Nobel Prize
nobel.desc: Est. 1901. Major discoveries and representative equations.

tier1.title: Tier 1 Awards Laureates
tier1.desc: Laureate history and representative formulas for Tier 1 research awards (excluding Nobel). Breakthrough, Abel, Fields, Turing, Lasker, Copley.

awards.title: Research Awards
awards.desc: Breakthrough, Nobel, Abel, Fields, Lasker, etc. By scale and impact.

frontier.title: Frontier Topics
frontier.desc: Areas where breakthroughs are predicted. Tracked separately as distinct topics. Top 20.
frontier.breakthroughReason: Why it could be a breakthrough

institutions.title: Institutions
institutions.desc: List of major research institutions worldwide by budget scale and prominence. For coverage verification. References: Nature Index, THE, budget data, etc.
institutions.criteriaDesc: Major research institutions by budget scale and prominence. Coverage verified.
institutions.classificationDesc: Top universities, national research institutions & academies, corporate R&D, pure mathematics

schema.title: Schema
schema.desc: Incompressible multidimensional complex system. Academic main axis, industrial auxiliary axis, multiple judgment axes.
